title: Employment conditions
content:
Get guidance on topics like awards and agreements, public holidays and the National Employment Standards.

In this section:
- Awards: Find out which award covers you and what your minimum conditions are.
- Agreements: Learn about enterprise agreements, how to check if you're covered by one and understanding entitlements.
- Information statements: Employers must give every new employee one or more information statements when they start work.
- National Employment Standards: Learn what the National Employment Standards are and who they apply to.
- Employment contracts: Find more information on employment contracts, including what advice we can give on them.
- Public holidays: 2026 public holidays, Not working on public holidays, Cultural and religious holidays.
- Hours of work, breaks and rosters: Find out about ordinary and overtime hours, breaks and rosters in your industry.
- Flexibility in the workplace: Read more about how employers and employees can make flexible working arrangements in the workplace.
- Performance in the workplace: Learn about performance management, when employees get warnings and serious misconduct.
- Protections at work: Read more about what employee rights are protected at work and where to get help.
- Representational rights and responsibilities in the workplace: Get access to information and advice on unions and employer associations, workplace delegates, right of entry and industrial actions.
- When businesses change owners: Discover what happens to employee entitlements when a business changes owners.
- Bullying, sexual harassment and discrimination at work: Learn about bullying, sexual harassment and discrimination.
- Workers compensation: Find out what workers compensation is, and who to contact for help about payments.

key_facts.description: Top-level index of FWO employment conditions topics
